title: JSON fallback component for agent tool calls
purpose: Displays input, output, and error information for agent tool calls in a formatted JSON structure with appropriate styling.
module_context: Defines a React component that renders tool call data including input, output, and error properties with consistent styling and conditional rendering.

steps.content: Determine if the tool call has output data.
Format the output data as a string, either using the raw string or JSON stringifying the object.
Render the tool call input as a formatted JSON string in a preformatted element.
IF output data exists, render it in a separate preformatted element with a header.
IF an error exists, render it in a red monospace text element.
